query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: A black-and-white photograph showing a person wearing a cap through the lower right pane of a four-panel window. Broad-leafed plants appear in the lower left foreground. The window is divided into four rectangular panes by intersecting vertical and horizontal muntins. The person is situated inside, head bowed, with the cap brim and sections of their face and hands discernible through the glass.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A severely underexposed black-and-white photograph in which deep shadows engulf most of the frame, leaving only select highlights to reveal a person in a cap behind a divided window. The subject is partially obscured and cropped by the lower window frame and the bottom edge of the composition, while broad-leafed plants intrude from the foreground. The oppressive darkness and withheld view generate an atmosphere of isolation and melancholy.
